guidance: Reaffirmed 40-50% annual growth target across CPP and IPP segments.
BESS capacity to be fully operational by FY27; revenue from FY28.
IPP cash flows to strengthen FY27-28, easing interest burden over time.
insights: FY26 rev ₹2,742cr +56%, PAT ₹509cr +57%; Q4 PAT ₹155cr, EBITDA margin ~37%.
Installed 1.62 GW, work-in-progress 4.64 GW; total portfolio ~6.26 GW.
Energized 447 MW in Q4; 376 MW Khavda GUVNL IPP hit by evacuation delays.
Consolidated debt ~₹4,532cr, D/E jumped to 1.49 on debt-funded expansion.
concall.orderExecution: 4.64 GW work-in-progress commissioning in phases across FY27-28, subject to evacuation approvals.
concall.source: KPI Green Q4 FY26 concall, May 12 2026; ScanX, InvestyWise, Whalesbook, SolarQuarter

notes: Registry-level identity only; a detail JSON has not been added yet (model + manual approach).
